summary: API ack/finish specs now assert disabled and invalid-token lifecycle requests reject before job mutation, lookup, or linked-run sync.
Ack/finish metadata shape remains compatible with CLI expectations: rejected ack/finish is surfaced via acked/finished plus reason, and loop stops on failed finish writeback.
Default-off and token-gate preservation is covered by API specs; CLI still requires explicit execute/loop bounds and heartbeat remains optional.
Focused CLI test relocation appears coverage-preserving within the scoped files; board evidence does not claim readiness beyond verified foreground task-pull behavior.
